user.title: Connect to Meshpoint
user.description: Enter your Meshpoint gateway's address. If "Require authentication" is on under Meshpoint's Configuration → Metrics, also generate an API key there and paste it below. That key grants read-only access to three status endpoints (packet/node stats, system health, and the richer stats-page data) -- never write access, never mesh/node data.

data.api_key: API key (leave blank if authentication is off)

error.cannot_connect: Could not reach Meshpoint at that address.
error.metrics_disabled: The /metrics endpoint is disabled — enable it in Meshpoint's Configuration → Metrics page first.

abort.already_configured: This Meshpoint gateway is already configured.

init.title: Meshpoint options
init.description: Change how often Home Assistant polls this Meshpoint gateway. Host, port, and API key can't be changed here -- remove and re-add the integration for those.
